mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_video_template WHERE template_type = #{templateType} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM t_video_template WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC
SELECT * FROM t_video_template WHERE is_default = 1 AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_video_template SET template_name = #{templateName}, template_type = #{templateType}, preview_url = #{previewUrl}, template_url = #{templateUrl}, duration = #{duration}, default_music = #{defaultMusic}, style_config = #{styleConfig}, text_style = #{textStyle}, transition_effect = #{transitionEffect}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status} WHERE template_id = #{templateId}
